{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],

  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent output does not address the major issues of internal contradictions in the system architecture and contribution claim.",
    "R1.2": "The agent output does not engage with the argument chain, failing to identify logical consistency issues.",
    "RX.1": "The agent output does not flag uncertainty for any clearly out-of-reach claims or mark confidence and missing evidence.",
    "RX.3": "The agent output covers a substantially different active set than requested, as it only addresses conceptual reconstruction and logical consistency.",
    "RX.4": "The agent output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content by failing to address the major issues of internal contradictions and contribution claim.",
    "RX.5": "The agent output blends sources without traceability, failing to annotate non-cosmetic changes with source and reason."
  },

rationale.R1.1: The agent output does not address the major issues of internal contradictions in the system architecture and contribution claim.
rationale.R1.2: The agent output does not engage with the argument chain, failing to identify logical consistency issues.
rationale.RX.1: The agent output does not flag uncertainty for any clearly out-of-reach claims or mark confidence and missing evidence.
rationale.RX.3: The agent output covers a substantially different active set than requested, as it only addresses conceptual reconstruction and logical consistency.
rationale.RX.4: The agent output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content by failing to address the major issues of internal contradictions and contribution claim.
rationale.RX.5: The agent output blends sources without traceability, failing to annotate non-cosmetic changes with source and reason.
